title: $60.4K Becomes 'most important area:' Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
summary: Bitcoin saw its highest levels in nearly two weeks at the weekly close, but bulls needed a push beyond $65,000 for real trend inflection, said the latest BTC price analysis.

title: South Korea weighs action against Polymarket over gambling concerns
summary: South Korea’s media and communications review body will hear from Polymarket before deciding whether to issue a corrective request against the prediction market platform.

title: Grains Move Higher as Weather Concerns Loom Over US, Europe
summary: Soybean and corn futures in Chicago jumped as traders turned their attention to weather concerns looming over crop development.

title: EasyJet’s Stock Shows Castlelake Bid Is Far From a Done Deal
summary: EasyJet Plc stock traded well below Castlelake LP’s latest takeover bid, signaling investors remain concerned about the potential barriers facing the £5 billion-plus deal.

title: New UK Election Funding Rules Could Hit Reform's Crypto Billionaire Donors
summary: The crackdown on overseas cash comes after billionaire Tether investor and Reform donor Christopher Harborne registered to vote in the UK.

title: Fake Mac Clipboard App Delivers New Password-Stealing Malware
